zh.lifeSummary: 當Dr. Ebenezer Seward於1703年6月7日出生在美國康乃狄克州米德萊可達勒姆時，他的父親Caleb Seward41歲，母親Lydia Bushnell42歲。他於1730年10月19日與Sarah Wells在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1783年12月22日在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登格蘭維爾享年80歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登格蘭維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dr. Ebenezer Seward于1703年6月7日出生在美国康涅狄格州米德萊可達勒姆时，他的父亲Caleb Seward41岁，母亲Lydia Bushnell42岁。他于1730年10月19日与Sarah Wells在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1783年12月22日在美国马萨诸塞州哈普登格蘭維爾享年80岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州哈普登格蘭維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Seward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Seward (Old English Sǣweard, from sǣ ‘sea’ + weard ‘guard’).
English: from the Middle English personal name Siward, Seward (Old English Sigeweard, from sige ‘victory’ + weard ‘guard’, or the equivalent Old Norse Sigwarth).
Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Suaird, Ó Suairt, usually Anglicized as Sword .

variants.name: Sewer
meanings: African American: probably an altered form of English   Seward  .
Swiss German: habitational name for someone from either of two places called Seewen (Schwyz and Solothurn).
Germanized or Americanized form of Slovenian and Croatian   Sever  .

variants.name: Sword
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Seward  .
English: nickname from Middle English sword(e), swerd(e) ‘sword’, perhaps used for a swordsman or armourer.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Suaird, Ó Suairt ‘descendant of Suart’, a personal name derived from Old Norse Sigvarthr ‘victory keeper’, a cognate of Old English Sigeweard; compare Seward 2.

variants.name: Sheward
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Seward  .

nameMeanings.name: Ebenezer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a biblical place name (meaning ‘stone of help’ in Hebrew). This was the site of the battle where the Israelites were defeated by the Philistines (1 Samuel 4:1). After they took their revenge, Samuel set up a memorial stone bearing this name (1 Samuel 7:12). It was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 17th century, possibly after being misread in the Bible as a personal name, or else because of its favourable etymological connotations. It now has unfavourable connotations because of the miserly character of  Ebenezer Scrooge  in  Charles Dickens's  A Christmas Carol (  1843 ), but nevertheless is still occasionally used.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: British Forces Capture Fort Griswold
historicEvents.description: The capture of Fort Griswold was the final act of treason that Benedict Arnold committed. This would be a British victory. On the American side 85 were killed, 35 wounded and paroled, 28 taken prisoner, 13 escaped, and 1 twelve year old was captured and released.
historicEvents.urlTitle: History of the Battle of Groton and The Burning of New London

en.lifeSummary: When Dr. Ebenezer Seward was born on 7 June 1703, in Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, United States, his father, Caleb Seward, was 41 and his mother, Lydia Bushnell, was 42. He married Sarah Wells on 19 October 1730, in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 22 December 1783, in Granville, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 80, and was buried in Granville, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dr. Ebenezer Seward est né le 7 juin 1703, à Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, États-Unis, son père, Caleb Seward, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lydia Bushnell, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Wells le 19 octobre 1730, à Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 décembre 1783, à Granville, Hampden, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Granville, Hampden, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dr. Ebenezer Seward am 7. Juni 1703 in Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Caleb Seward 41 und seine Mutter Lydia Bushnell 42. Er hat am 19. Oktober 1730 in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Wells geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Dezember 1783 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Granville, Hampden, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Granville, Hampden, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dr. Ebenezer Seward è nato il il 7 giugno 1703 nel Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Caleb Seward, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Lydia Bushnell, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Wells il 19 ottobre 1730, nel Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 22 dicembre 1783, nel Granville, Hampden, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Granville, Hampden, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Dr. Ebenezer Sewardが1703年6月7日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ミッドレセックスダルハムで生まれた時，父Caleb Sewardは41歳，母Lydia Bushnellは42歳であった。1730年10月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベングイルフォードでSarah Wellsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1783年12月22日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデングランヴィルで80歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデングランヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dr. Ebenezer Seward(이)가 1703년 6월 7일 미국 코네티컷 주 미들레세스 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Caleb Seward(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Lydia Bushnell(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1730년 10월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 Sarah Wells(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1783년 12월 22일 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 그랜빌에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 그랜빌에 묻혔다.

pt.7 June 1703–22 December 1783: 7 de junho de 1703–22 de dezembro de 1783
pt.Torrington, Litchfield, Connecticut, Uni: Torrington, Litchfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dr. Ebenezer Seward nasceu em 7 de junho de 1703, em Durham, Middlesex, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Caleb Seward, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lydia Bushnell, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Wells em 19 de outubro de 1730, em Guilford, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de dezembro de 1783, em Granville, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Granville, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut, Britis: гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dr. Ebenezer Seward родился 7 июня 1703 г. в местности дурам, миддлесекс, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Caleb Seward было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lydia Bushnell, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Wells 19 октября 1730 г. в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 22 декабря 1783 г. в местности гранвилл, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности гранвилл, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dr. Ebenezer Seward nació el 7 de junio de 1703, en Durham, Middlesex, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, su papá, Caleb Seward, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lydia Bushnell, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Sarah Wells el 19 de octubre de 1730, en Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1783, en Granville, Hampden, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Granville, Hampden, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
